feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Datasphere
feed.subtitle: SAP Datasphere Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Cds Documentation
entry.content:
Hello everyone,
I am unable to find the documentation for the following CDS views in the S/4HANA 1809 section:

I_PurchaseOrder
I_PurchaseOrderItem
I_Supplier
I_Customer
I_Product
I_Stock
I_Material
I_Movement
I_ProfitCenter
I_GLAccountLineItem
I_SalesAnalysis
I_Project
I_ProjectNetwork
I_SalesCondition

If I check the CDS views at this link, not all the standard CDS views are documented like the ones mentioned above
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/ee6ff9b281d8448f96b4fe6c89f2bdc8/8573b810511948c8a99c0672abc159aa.html?locale=en-US&version=1809.latest

Does anyone know how to perform a more in-depth search or where I can find official documentation for these views?

Thank you!

entry.title: Calculating Time Interval between Two Time Feilds
entry.content:
SAP Datasphere #TimeInterval

Hi All,
I have requirement to calculate the time interval between two Time Feilds in Graphical View using Calculated Column
There are 4 Dimension for a requirement with data in below format. I need to calculate time interval between Process Order Start Time and Finish Time in Hours. I have tried various function but it's not giving accurate results. Can anyone help me to calculate the expected results.

Process Order Actual Start DateProcess Order Actual Finish DateProcess Order Actual Start Time (HHMISS)Process Order Actual Finish Time (HHMISS)Time Interval between Process Order Start Time and Finish Time in hrs (Expected Result)
20250106202501071641440000008
202501072025012206393300000018
20250117
20250117
000000
093135
9

entry.title: Calculated measure in a hierarchy of measures inside an Analytical model in the Data Sphere
entry.content:
Hi Hi,

I would like to create an analytical model inside the data sphere product. 

I have three measures, lets say Gross Sales, Net Sales, Tax. 

there is a logic between these measures. meaning, Gross Sales minus (-) the Tax = Net Sales.

so, the idea is to generate a model with one Level based measure. or a Hierarchy level. where I show the Gross Sales as the primary measure and the other two should be "sons" measures inside of it. 

when I open the Gross Sales, I get the to other measures. that sum up to it. and I will see the NetSales and the Tax as two measures inside the Gross Sales. 

similar to a financial report. where one measure is the SUM of all other measures and it is built as a Tree, or a Hierarchy of measures. 

sorry in advance if this is a newbie question, but would love any assistance in this kind of design in the DataSphere product.

entry.title: Exception 70002620: Execution Plan Operation failed could not execute from the remote database
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

I am facing an issue with the error "Exception 70002620: Execution Plan Operation failed could not execute from the remote database", 

developed a fact view using SLT Remote Tables it is working fine as expected, when ever I try to include the associations to get Key & Text or any Hierarchy it gives the below error from Analytical Model

Note: Individual dimensions are working fine as expected, the association mapping is also across the same column & data type.

entry.title: SAP Datasphere Data Flow fails
entry.content:
Dear experts,

I am trying to load a local table in SAP datasphere using a Data Flow. The point is to use a graphical view as a source and load the result in the local table for improvement performance in the final report. The graphical view consists of 2 local tables joined together and a calculation step where I calculate 6 columns. All good so far, the result of the join returns something about 4.3M records (records which are available in the data preview and I can see them pretty quick), however the data flow stops with the error "<General error;129 transaction rolled back by an internal error: Allocation failed; Reason: configured statement memory limit from global configuration reached (SAP Note 3191224)>".

 

Please help me understand what is the issue and what can be done to avoid getting this error.

 

Thank you and regards,

Florin

entry.title: Datasphere Hierarquies Import
entry.content: I have this 2 excels, and iam associating them, to get the revenue and still have the Master Data with hierarquies, but i wanted to have more years ( 2024, 2025 ), but when i try to that i need to duplicate master data, and the "Econ0micaChild" is the master key for now, can someone help me find a way to make this work?

entry.title: DataSphere Malfunction: Blank Page in Preview Model
entry.content:
Hi team,

I made an example for hierarchies in datasphere that i created a dimension that is master data, 2 facts and a view, i created a model from the view and its all ok, but when i preview the model, a blank page appears

Did this happen to anyone?

Master data dimension:

Facts:

Fact 1:

Fact 2:

Model:

Thanks in Advance,

GAnjos

entry.title: Extracting Delta from S/4HANA CDS View to Datasphere using Replication Flow
entry.content:
Hi Experts 

Need your help. Here's the scenario we have a delta enabled CDS view and we use Replication flow (all one to one from CDS and target table in replication flow and the replication flow projection , no filters applied) to extract data from CDS view to datasphere. 

The number of records in CDS and also extracted in datasphere visible as Initial Load Operation in Data Integration Monitor matches but the records finally loaded to the target table in datasphere replication flow are different and less than the number of records that CDS view displays in output or even the number of records that are visible in initial Load operation

Here i am attaching the snapshot of two scenario which shows the target table records in datasphere and the Initial load operation in data integration matches vs the snapshot that has discrepancy. Please suggest why the records do not match as its all one to one between CDS and datasphere

Attaching the Png files for both the scenarios

your help and inputs will be much appreciated

@SAPSupport 

@junwu 

@Vera_Jiang 

@raymond_giuseppi 

@William_Yu 

@DonWilliams 

@Chandan_ 

@vinaymittal 

@hoerzenbergers 

@mauriciolauffer

entry.title: Connect SAP Datasphere to SAP RISE
entry.content: If I need to connect SAP Datasphere to SAP RISE, do I need a dpagent connection? SAP Rise is hosted on Google as a database.

entry.title: BW Bridge: In what schema can I find table TFACS?
entry.content:
Hello,

I have a requirement to use the WORKDAYS_BETWEEN function an AMDP transformation routine in BW Bridge. I get an error that the TFACS table cannot be found in the schema when I try to load some data. I found the TFACS table in BW Bridge using the search, but there is no schema mentioned there. Also, when I try to preview the data of TFACS, I get an error that I'm not authorized to do so. I used the Datasphere Database Explorer as an alternative to test my SQL, but I get the same error. Any idea of how I can find the schema and resolve this issue?

entry.title: SAP BDC Trial Version Release
entry.content:
Hi All,

Could you help me determine the release date of the trial version of SAP Business Data Cloud? Clients are requesting a demo, and I’d appreciate any insights.

Thanks!

entry.title: Document flow from C_SDDOCMULTILEVELPROCFLOWDEX to level based hierarchy?
entry.content:
I am currently working with the data from C_SDDOCMULTILEVELPROCFLOWDEX which represents the SD document flow. Since it always shows the RECEDINGDOCUMENT and SUBSEQUENTDOCUMET a level based hierarchy should work. 

Yet when I try to implement it, the model simply fails to show me any preview or data.

Is there anything that I'm missing here?

entry.title: Issue with Updating Columns and Hierarchies in SAC Story from Datasphere Analytical Model
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I’ve created a story in SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) based on an Analytical Model (AM) in Datasphere. Initially, the model had 10 columns and 2 hierarchies (created using associations). Later, I added a new column and hierarchy (added new association) to the model, but these updates are not reflected in the SAC story.

As a temporary solution, I created a new AM and built a new story, but this doesn’t seem like a sustainable option in the long run, especially when frequent updates to the model are required.

Is this a known limitation of the Analytical Model, or is there a more efficient way to ensure that updates to the AM are automatically reflected in the SAC story without needing to recreate everything from scratch?

Any advice or suggestions would be greatly appreciated!

Thank you!

entry.title: Datasphere's task chain are not triggered after recent updates on HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Hello,

in the last week end an update of HANA Cloud under of Datasphere happens, according to this note https://me.sap.com/notes/3220622/E

We found that in many customers the scheduled task chains are not triggered.

The error seems random and not related to recent Datasphere upgrades about "scheduling with local timezone".

 

Did you experience this? 

are there any SAP notes?

thanks,

Alberto

entry.title: Couldn"t find transport requests in BW bridge (Eclipse)
entry.content:
When connecting via Eclipse to ECC and BW (through the BW Bridge), I am unable to locate any Transport Requests specifically for the BW Bridge. However, transport requests for ECC are visible under the Transport Organizer within BW Bridge. This issue is critical, as I need visibility into BW Bridge transport requests for effective development and management.

Required Assistance:
Please help clarify or modify the Eclipse configuration to ensure BW Bridge transport requests are visible within the Transport Organizer.

entry.title: Can i connect to two different sap s4 hana public cloud tenants in a single sap datasphere tenant?
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am setting up a SAP Datasphere system , right now there are 2 source system(S/4 HANA Public Cloud- Dev & Test). S/4 HANA Prod tenant is not yet live. Now the GO live is planned on first week of May, but the organization needs the reports from SAP DSP on Go Live Week itself. So for testing purpose is it prescribed to connect both the Dev & Test system to SAP DSP and configure 2 different space and import the models in between?

The Test Tenant has good data which will help to test out the reports?

 

Thanks in advance.

Regards,

Tanumay.

SAP Datasphere SAP HANA Cloud

entry.title: Datasphere: Transport connection from test system to prod
entry.content:
Hello,

We have two tenants in SAP Datasphere: one for the test system and one for the production system

When transporting a connected object (for example, a remote table) via export/import from one tenant to another, how can we change the connection from test to production?

Thanks.

entry.title: Sap Support when MFA authentication is active
entry.content:
Hello expert.

In the Tinexta environment, to connect to the Datasphere environment, an MFA authentication process has been put in place. I was wondering, in such circumstances, which are the Sap best practices to enable the user devoted to you (the Sap Support User) to connect to the Datasphere environment. Now, to enable to your team to connect, we have temporally disabled the MFA authentication process, but I suppose that this cannot be a stable solution, even considering that in the future we will need your assistance for the Production environment, where we will not be authorized to disable the MFA authentication process. I hope you got my point.

Waiting for your reply

Regards

Andrea

entry.title: Delta extraction is not working in SAP Datasphere
entry.content: I have used CDS View Entity for delta extraction and also used all the annotations. But delta load is not working. Is delta load not work for CDS View Entity?

entry.title: Information Design Tool: The application was unable to start correctly 0xc000007b Click to close th
entry.content:
Installed Business Objects Client   2025 
BIPLATCLNT4400_0-80008792.EXE 

Cannot open Information Design Tool: The application was unable to start correctly 0xc000007b Click to close the Application
